summary: Provision AWS Directory Service directories. Creating a directory is an engineer-gated form; the administrator password is set out of band, and the network placement is reviewed.

operations.title: Provision a directory
operations.summary: Create the directory shell and its network placement. The admin password is set out of band by an engineer.
operations.description: Create an aws_directory_service_directory: the directory type, edition, and VPC placement. The administrator password is NEVER captured here - an engineer sets it out of band. The VPC and subnets are inventory pickers. Submitting drafts the resource and routes it to an engineer to complete and own.

params.name: directory_name
params.label: Directory name
params.help: The fully-qualified directory DNS name (written to the name attribute), for example corp.example.com.

params.name: directory_type
params.label: Directory type
params.help: MicrosoftAD is a managed Microsoft AD; SimpleAD is a small Samba-based directory; ADConnector proxies to an on-premises AD.

params.name: edition
params.label: Edition
params.help: The MicrosoftAD edition; Standard suits most workloads, Enterprise scales larger.

params.name: size
params.label: Size
params.help: The SimpleAD size; ignored for MicrosoftAD.

params.name: admin_password
params.label: Admin password
params.help: The directory administrator password is never captured or typed here; an engineer sets it out of band after the directory shell exists.

params.name: vpc_id
params.label: VPC
params.help: The VPC the directory is placed in (the aws_vpc.id it references).

params.name: subnet_ids
params.label: Subnets
params.help: Two subnets in different availability zones for the directory (the aws_subnet.id values it references).

params.name: description_tag
params.label: Description
params.help: A short description recorded as the resource's Description tag.

params.name: pic
params.label: Person in charge
params.help: The team or person accountable for this resource, recorded as its PIC tag.

decisions: The directory administrator password is never captured here; an engineer sets it out of band, so no credential ever passes through the portal. This form provisions the directory shell and its network placement only.
Confirm the two subnets are in different availability zones in the selected VPC; a directory needs multi-AZ placement to be highly available.
